text:

porttools stills complais about this:

===> Extra files and directories check
lib/python2.6/site-packages/site.pyo
lib/python2.6/site-packages/site.pyc
lib/python2.6/site-packages/site.py
lib/python2.6/site-packages/easy-install.pth

...but I don't know easy-install (nor python), so maybe that's normal
since it's a common file in all the easy-install packages and only the
last one should delete it? (or something)

Also, the attached patch silences portlint warnings.

cheers,
